probability.last_reasoning: Adjusting bear case up from 10% to 12% — extreme fear at 10, compound stress upgraded to ELEVATED with USD/JPY above threshold and JGB converging, and three kill switches still lacking data at 25% through measurement year. Shifting 2% from base to mid to reflect RLUSD recovery and institutional infrastructure momentum (Ripple Prime, Metallicus FedNow, XRPL records) that continues building despite macro headwinds. The thesis paradox is sharpening: macro stress validates the need for alternative settlement infrastructure while simultaneously threatening the position.

bear_case.score_reasoning: Score reflects three compounding concerns: (1) three of five kill switches are data-dark 3+ months into the measurement year, preventing thesis validation; (2) RLUSD growth pace is ~5x below what's needed for target; (3) extreme fear at 10 with XRP at $1.39 — price action is not reflecting institutional adoption momentum. The counter-thesis has real teeth right now.

competing_infrastructure.name: SWIFT GPI
competing_infrastructure.status_text: SWIFT continues incremental upgrades across 11,500-bank network. No disruptive capability yet, but network effects remain the strongest moat in cross-border payments.

competing_infrastructure.name: Visa B2B Connect
competing_infrastructure.status_text: B2B Connect expanding but focused on high-value corridors with traditional rails. Not directly competing for the same settlement layer thesis.

competing_infrastructure.name: JPMorgan Kinexys
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Kinexys (ex-Onyx) processing significant institutional volumes on permissioned infrastructure. JPMorgan's balance sheet backing gives it credibility advantages over XRP for risk-averse institutions.

competing_infrastructure.name: BIS Project Nexus
competing_infrastructure.status_text: Nexus explicitly designed for sovereign settlement without private tokens. If operational at scale, it directly competes with the XRP bridge currency thesis. Kill switch #9 exists for this reason.

competing_infrastructure.name: Ethereum Institutional
competing_infrastructure.status_text: BlackRock BUIDL, Ondo, Franklin Templeton all building on Ethereum for tokenized assets. Ethereum's institutional footprint in RWA tokenization exceeds XRPL's despite technical disadvantages.

bear_case.odl_stagnation: ODL volume data has been dark for months — the absence of public reporting from Ripple, combined with the kill switch at NEEDS_DATA, means we cannot verify the core utility thesis at all.
bear_case.token_velocity_concern: No token velocity or average hold time data available. If XRP is being used purely as a bridge with sub-second hold times, price appreciation from utility is structurally limited regardless of volume.

macro_headwinds.name: Global Recession Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: Fear & Greed at 10, VIX >20, S&P flat, compound stress ELEVATED — recession signals are flashing across multiple indicators simultaneously.

macro_headwinds.name: Crypto Winter Signals
macro_headwinds.status_text: XRP at $1.39 is significantly off highs, but ETF infrastructure and institutional on-ramps provide structural support that prior cycles lacked. Not yet winter, but cooling rapidly.

macro_headwinds.name: Regulatory Reversal Risk
macro_headwinds.status_text: 7 spot ETFs live, Clarity Act pending, SEC case resolved. Regulatory direction is clearly favorable; reversal would require extraordinary political shift.

macro_headwinds.name: Rate Hike Extension
macro_headwinds.status_text: US 10Y at 3.97% suggests market pricing cuts, but BOJ tightening pressure and global yield divergence create unpredictable cross-currents for risk assets.

bear_case.bear_narrative: INCREASE MONITORING. Core thesis validation remains blind: ODL volume is a suspicious absence (304 days to $25B target, zero baseline), RLUSD is stalling at 32% of target with first contraction detected, and pilot purgatory explains the gap between Ripple's announcement velocity and production reality. Bear pressure 74 — elevated but not terminal because no kill switch is triggered, genuine infrastructure is being built (Hidden Road registrations, PermissionedDEX live, SBI committed, 7 ETFs), and competitive threats are less severe than feared after audit (SWIFT and mBridge serve different layers). The paradox stands: compound stress at MONITORING but pre-loaded across all three legs means the macro environment that would validate demand for alternative settlement rails is the same environment that destroys risk appetite for XRP-as-asset. The Q3 2026 kill switch cluster is the decisive test. Until then, we are watching infrastructure being built toward a deadline with no evidence it will be used.
